title: tapeinaegle humilis
intro: Tapeinaegle humilis, also known as San Huáng San, is a type of traditional Chinese medicinal plant, classified as a member of the family Araliaceae. The plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Tapeinaegle humilis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various types of infections, making it a valuable component in traditional Chinese medicine. Herbal preparations of Tapeinaegle humilis can be found in various forms, including dried roots and leaves, teas, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
